response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video to detect vocal music. The video consists primarily of dialogue and improvised melodic jingles performed by the character Cecilia Immergreen (e.g., 'Spin to win', 'It's Ototori'). No full vocal songs by any external artists were detected. Therefore, no web searches for lyrics were conducted as there were no songs to analyze. All segments are marked as not containing vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Cecilia Immergreen, consisting of dialogue, short improvised melodic phrases (jingles), and polling about a 3D reveal. No full vocal songs by external artists are present.

scenes.description: Introduction: Cecilia talking about her debut year.
Dramatic Egg Intro: Cecilia appears from an egg with background instrumental music.
Cecilia Out of Egg: Cecilia talks to viewers and introduces her first guest, Ototori.
Polling: Cecilia discusses options with viewers and interacts with Ototori.
Final Scenes: Cecilia changes her outfit and talks more.
